message:
feat(console): Add configurable output stream per RICH_SPEC.md Section 7.3

- Add `file: RefCell<Box<dyn Write + Send>>` field to Console struct
- Add manual Debug impl for Console (Box<dyn Write> doesn't impl Debug)
- Console::new() now defaults file to stdout
- Add ConsoleBuilder.file() builder method
- Update build() to use file field if provided
- Migrate all methods from io::stdout() to self.file.borrow_mut():
  - print_text(), print_segments(), print_with_options()
  - line(), rule(), clear(), clear_line()
  - set_title(), bell(), log()
- Add tests: test_custom_output_stream, test_custom_output_stream_line

Closes: rich_rust-dsh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
